Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The current underfitting structure starts with creating and approving the requisition then a parallel block for the rest of the steps allowing them to occur in any order followed by closing the case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This allows for example paying the invoice before receiving goods or receiving the invoice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Create requisition and approve requisition are sequential then create PO must be after approval then receive goods must be after PO then receive invoice after goods then match invoice to PO after both goods and invoice are received then pay invoice after match then close case

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus we need sequential steps create requisition approve requisition create PO receive goods receive invoice match invoice pay invoice close case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Potential nuance receive goods may happen before receiving invoice but must be after PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also match requires both goods receipt and invoice receipt

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So we need a gateway that merges after receiving goods and receiving invoice a parallel gateway that requires both to be done before proceeding to match

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So corrected pseudocode create requisition approve requisition create PO then parallel receipt of goods and invoice then after both are done match invoice to PO then pay invoice then close case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This ensures that each step occurs only after its predecessor and parallel steps are limited to receipt of goods and invoice which must both be completed before matching

Name: Validation - PE
Text: No out of order behavior like paying before receiving goods
